_comment_user_agent: Be honest and identifiable. Put a real contact email here — it's what makes the scraper a good citizen and what Nominatim's policy requires.
_comment_home: === SET THE RECIPIENT'S HOME AREA HERE === The map opens centered on these coordinates at this zoom (he can pan anywhere from there). Right-click his city in Google Maps to get lat/lon. Zoom 8 shows roughly a 150-mile region.
